productDisplayName: FILA Men Smash III Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy excellent comfort in these slip-on shoes from fila. Smash III, with its mesh upper and slip-on technique, offers a great, flexible, Fit. Wear for active Sports or team these shoes with a T-shirt and denims for a great casual look.UpperMeshed upper for maximum ventilation and durabilityStitch detailing in ridges for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot supportReinforced heel cup for extra support to the back footReinforced toe box for durability and added protection to the forefootSlip-on system for easy wearCut-out at the midfoot for easy wearBrand name on the side and tongue for styleMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorptionCushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfortRemovable sockliner to replace with a medical orthoticOutsoleOutsole with multi-directional pattern for superior gripFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feetProtruding lugs for grip on all terrainsshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
